other.name: Soul Trap
other.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons. The first time the bearer makes a melee attack that destroys an enemy model, after all the bearer's attacks have been resolved, until the end of the battle, add an additional 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.

other.name: Overlord
other.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Drukhari**^^ unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

other.name: Devious Mastermind
other.description: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

other.name: Shadowfield
other.description: You cannot re-roll invulnerable saving throws made for the bearer. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for the bearer is failed, until the end of the battle, the bearer has no invulnerable save.

other.name: Hatred Eternal (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting or the Fight phase, when you select this model's unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Splinter pistol; Blast pistol; Huskblade; Agoniser; Master-crafted power weapon.

other.name: Pain Engine (Aura)
other.description:
Each time you spend 1 Pain token to Empower a friendly unit within 9" of this unit, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if one or more models in this unit are not equipped with a spirit vortex: on a 5+, you gain 1 Pain token.


**Designer's Note:** Pain tokens you spend for reasons other than Empowering a unit do not trigger this ability.

other.name: Pain Parasite (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time this unit shoots or fights, after it has resolved its attacks, if one or more enemy models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, one model in this unit regains up to 3 lost wounds (if all models in this unit have their starting number of wounds and this unit is below its Starting Strength, 1 model is returned to this unit with 3 wounds remaining).

composition.equipment: equipped with: Spirit Vortex.

other.name: Master of Blades (Pain)
other.description: In the Fight phase, when you select this model's unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

other.name: Onslaught
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a Pile-In or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

other.name: Silent Executioner
other.description: Each time this model make an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If that target is Below Half-Strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

composition.equipment: equipped with: ➤ The Executioner's demiklaives - Dual Blades; ➤ The Executioner's demiklaives - Single Blade.

other.name: Fear Incarnate (Aura)
other.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test.

other.name: Pain Adept
other.description: In your Command phase, if one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.

other.name: Fleshcraft (Pain)
other.description: In your Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this model's unit. Each time you do, you can return up to D3+1 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Haemonculus tools and scissorhands; Stinger Pistol.

other.name: Phantasm Grenade Launcher
other.description: The bearer’s unit has the Grenades keyword.

other.name: Battlefield Butchery (Pain)
other.description: In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of this unit's melee weapons.

other.name: Skyboard Evasion
other.description: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

composition.equipment: equipped with: Hellglaive; Splinter Pods; Splinter Pods.

other.name: Tormentors
other.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test. Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a Battle-shocked unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

other.name: Decapitating Strikes (Pain)
other.description: In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an ^^**Infantry**^^ unit, that attack has the ^^**[Devastating Wounds]**^^ ability.

other.name: Incubi Shrine Token
other.description: Once per battle for each Incubi Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a Klaivex or Incubi model in this unit to an unmodified 6.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Klaive.

other.name: Phantasm Grenade Launcher
other.description: The bearer’s unit has the ^^**Smoke**^^ and ^^**Grenades**^^ keywords.

other.name: Kabalite Icon
other.description: While the bearer's unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic.

other.name: Cruel Enforcers
other.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under you control, until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

other.name: Sadistic Raiders (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Shredder; Close Combat Weapon; Splinter Rifle; Close Combat Weapon; Blaster; Close Combat Weapon; Splinter Cannon; Close Combat Weapon; Dark Lance; Close Combat Weapon.

other.name: Brides of Death (Pain)
other.description: In the Fight phase, when you select this model's unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

other.name: Thrilling Spectacle
other.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 3+ invulnerable save and change the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model to 12.

other.name: Blur of Blades
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Lelith's blades.

other.name: Fade Away (Pain)
other.description: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. Each time you do, remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

other.name: Shade Weavers
other.description: This unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

composition.equipment: equipped with: Baleblast; Glimmersteel Blade; Baleblast; Glimmersteel Blade.

other.name: Aethersails
other.description: While one or more ^^**Drukhari**^^ units are embarked within this model, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

other.name: Splinter Racks (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, when you select this model to shoot, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this model. While Empowered, if one or more units are embarked within this model, each time this model makes an attack with a ranged weapon that has the ^^**Anti**^^ ability, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

other.name: Vanguard of the Dark City
other.description: At the start of your Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Vanguard of the Dark City section (see left) for this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

other.name: Masters of the Shadowed Sky
other.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this model is within range of an objective marker you control, and if one or more ^^**Kabalite Warriors**^^ units are embarked within it, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

other.name: Speed of the Kill
other.description: Each time a ^^**Wyches**^^ unit disembarks from this model (excluding Emergency Disembarkations), models in that ^^**Wyches**^^ unit must be setup wholly within 6" of this model.

other.name: Visions of Butchery
other.description: While one or more ^^**Wracks**^^ units are embarked within this model, for each ^^**Wracks**^^ model embarked within this model, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's Bladevanes and chainsnares.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Bladevanes and chainsnares; Disintegrator Cannon; Dark Lance.

other.name: Eradicate the Foe
other.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is at its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

other.name: Agonising Suppression (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, when you select this model to shoot, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this model. While Empowered, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

damaged.description: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Bladevanes; Disintegrator Cannon; Dark Lance.

other.name: Ground-attack Craft
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding units that can ^^**Fly**^^), add 1 to the Hit roll.

other.name: Nowhere to Run (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, when you select this unit to shoot, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters**^^ and ^^**Vehicles**^^) hit by one or more of those attacks; until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit's Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Bladed Wings; ➤ Razorwing Missiles - Monoscythe Missiles; ➤ Razorwing Missiles - Neurotoxin Missiles; ➤ Razorwing Missiles - Shatterfield Missiles; Dark Lance; Disintegrator Cannon; Splinter Cannon; Twin Splinter Rifle.

other.name: Eviscerating Fly-by
other.description: Each time this unit ends a Normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monster **^^and ^^**Vehicle**^^ units) that it moved over during that move, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

other.name: Matchless Swiftness (Pain)
other.description: In your Movement phase, when you select this unit to Advance, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 8" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Splinter Rifle; Splinter Pistol; Bladevanes; Blaster; Splinter Pistol; Bladevanes; Splinter Pistol; Heat Lance; Bladevanes; Splinter Pistol; Bladevanes.

other.name: Airborne Evasion
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

other.name: Winged Strike (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, when you select this unit to shoot, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit makes a range attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Close combat weapon.

other.name: Lithe Agility (Pain)
other.description: In your Movement phase when you select this model's unit to Advance, or in your Charge phase before you make a Charge roll for this model's unit, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

other.name: Storm of Blades
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the ^^**[Sustained Hits 1]**^^ ability.

other.name: Bloody Spectacle
other.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Character**^^ unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's unit destroys a ^^**Character**^^ model, you gain 1CP.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Archite glaive and agoniser.

other.name: Torture Device
other.description: Each time this unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 additional Pain token.

other.name: Devoted to Pain
other.description: If a model in this unit is equipped with 2 macro-scalpels, those weapons have the ^^**[Twin-Linked]**^^ ability.

other.name: Mindless Killing Machines (Pain)
other.description: At the start of the Fight phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and it is then removed from play.

other.name: Aerialists
other.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this ^^**Transport**^^, you can select one friendly ^^**Drukhari Infantry**^^ unit that has 6 or fewer models that is wholly within 6" of this ^^**Transport**^^ (you cannot select a unit that can ^^**Fly**^^). Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this ^^**Transport**^^.

other.name: Rapid Deployment (Pain)
other.description: In your Movement phase, when you select this model to Advance, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this model. While Empowered, units can disembark from this model after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Bladevanes; Splinter Cannon; Twin Splinter Rifle.

other.name: Void Mine
other.description: Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy model that it moved over during that move, then roll one D6 for each enemy unit within D6" of that enemy model: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

other.name: Nowhere to Hide (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, when you select this unit to shoot, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

damaged.description: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Bladed Wings; ➤ Voidraven Missiles -  Implosion Missiles; ➤ Voidraven Missiles - Shatterfield Missiles; Void Lance; Dark Scythe.

other.name: Torturer’s Craft
other.description: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this unit has shot or fought, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Vehicles**^^) hit by one or more of those attacks. That units must take a Battle-shock test.

other.name: Experimental Enhancements (Pain)
other.description:
In the Fight phase, when you select this unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. Each time you do, select one of the following to apply to this unit until the end of the phase:

■ Melee weapons equipped by non-^^**Character**^^ models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 3.
■ Melee weapons equipped by non-^^**Character**^^ models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 4 and the ^^**[Hazardous]**^^ ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Torturer's tool; Hexrifle; Torturer's tool; Liquifier Gun; Torturer's tool; Ossefactor; Torturer's tool; Stinger Pistol.

other.name: No Escape
other.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters**^^ and ^^**Vehicles**^^) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

other.name: Acrobatic Gladiators (Pain)
other.description: At the start of your Charge phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Splinter Pistol; Hekatarii Blade; Gladiatorial weapons.

other.name: Reavers of the Void
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

other.name: Mistshield
other.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken rifle; Close Combat Weapon; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Pistol; Power sword; Blaster; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Pistol; Corsair shredder; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Pistol; Power sword; Close Combat Weapon.

other.name: Piratical Raiders
other.description: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

other.name: Channeler stones
other.description: Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for the bearer’s unit, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

other.name: Faolchú
other.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

other.name: Mistshield
other.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Paired Hekatarii blades; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Pistol; Power sword; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Pistol; Executioner; Witch staff; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Pistol; Power sword; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Pistol; Shuriken rifle; Close Combat Weapon; Power sword; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Pistol; Fusion pistol; Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Pistol; Close Combat Weapon; Long rifle; Close Combat Weapon; Close Combat Weapon; Power sword; Close Combat Weapon.

other.name: Death is Not Enough
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If one or more of those attacks destroyed a model in that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

other.name: Cruel Amusement
other.description:
In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, select one of the abilities below. Until the end of the phase, this model’s Shrieker Cannon has that ability:
■ [IGNORES COVER]
■ [PRECISION]
■ [SUSTAINED HITS 3]

composition.equipment: equipped with: Jester's Blade; Shrieker Cannon.

other.name: Blitz
other.description:
Once per battle, in your Movement phase, before this model makes a Normal move it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of
the turn, add 2D6" to this model’s Move characteristic and add 3 to the
Attacks characteristic of this model’s Solitaire weapons.

other.name: Blur of Movement
other.description: This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Solitaire Weapons.

other.name: Fog of Dreams (Psychic)
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

other.name: Treacherous Illusion (Psychic)
other.description: Melee weapons equipped by enemy models have the [Hazardous] ability while targeting this model's unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Shuriken Pistol; Neuro Disruptor; Miststave.

other.name: Acrobatic Grace
other.description: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close Combat Weapon.

other.name: Rapid Embarkation
other.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this Transport, you can select one friendly Harlequins Infantry unit that has 6 or fewer models that is wholly within 6" of this Transport. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this Transport.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close Combat Weapon; Shuriken Cannon.

other.name: Polychromatic Camoflage
other.description: This unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close Combat Weapon; ➤ Prismatic Cannon - dispersed pulse; ➤ Prismatic Cannon - focused lances; Voidweaver Haywire Cannon; Shuriken Cannon.

other.name: Dance of Death
other.description:
At the start of the Fight phase, select one of the following abilities for this unit to gain until the end of the phase:
■ Hero's Prowess: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ Villain's Doom: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
■ Trickster's Grace: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Shuriken Pistol; Shuriken Pistol; Harlequin's Special Weapon; Fusion Pistol; Neuro Disruptor.

other.name: Choreographer of War
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a Pile In or Consolidate move, it can move up to 6" instead of 3". In addition, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

other.name: Cegorach’s Favour:
other.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack you can re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and add 1 to the Wound roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Harlequin's Special Weapon; Troupe Master's Blade; Shuriken Pistol; Fusion Pistol; Neuro Disruptor.

other.name: Archon of the Poisoned Tongue (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this model's unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. If you do, select one of the following abilities: **^^[Sustained Hits 1]; [Lethal Hits]^^**. Until the end of the phase, while that unit is Empowered, weapons equipped by models in that unit have that selected ability.

other.name: Precognisant
other.description: If you army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**Drukhari**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

other.name: Mind Like a Steel Trap [Aura]
other.description: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Lady's Blade; Razor fan.

other.name: Murderous Crossfire
other.description: After this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ^^**Drukhari**^^ unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

other.name: Swooping Descent (Pain)
other.description: In your Movement phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time a model in this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. When doing so, if this unit is set up within 9" of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Shardcarbine; Close combat weapon; Close combat weapon.

other.name: Raid and Run
other.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D3+3". Otherwise, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, this unit can make a Fall Back move of up to D3+3".

composition.equipment: equipped with: Corsair Blade; Corsair Blade; Shuriken Pistol; Corsair blaster; Close Combat Weapon; Flamer; Close Combat Weapon; Fusion gun; Close Combat Weapon; Shredder; Close Combat Weapon.

other.name: Piratical Hero
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, that attack has the ^^**[Sustained Hits 1]**^^ ability and add 1 to the Hit roll.

other.name: Prince of Corsairs
other.description: After both players have deployed their armies, if this model is on the battlefield (or any ^^**Transport**^^ it is embarked within is on the battlefield), select up to three ^^**Aeldari**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

composition.equipment: equipped with: The Eye of Wrath; The Spear of Twilight; Shuriken Pistol.

other.name: Aethersense (Psychic)
other.description: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

other.name: Fury of the Void (Psychic)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more attacks made with this model’s Dread of the Deep Void. Until the end of the turn, that unit is riven. Each time an ^^**Aeldari**^^ model from your army makes an attack that targets a riven unit, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Dread of the Deep Void; Waystave.

other.name: Hallucinogen Grenades
other.description: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one ^^**Aeldari**^^ Infantry unit from your army visible to and within 36" of this unit: until the end of the phase, that unit has the Stealth ability.

other.name: Hatred Eternal (Pain)
other.description: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this model’s unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

other.name: Cruel Example
other.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can add 1 to the Wound roll. Each time this model’s unit destroys a CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

other.name: Fleshcraft (Pain)
other.description: In your Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this model’s unit. Each time you do, you can return up to D3+1 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

other.name: Pain Adept
other.description: In your Command phase, if one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.
